summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DRHP Builder Module (Task 4) with 13 sub-modules. All core features working excellently including structured form fields, document upload/download, OCR processing, tab navigation, and data persistence.

design_issues.issue: Minor navigation issue when clicking breadcrumb links in some sections

passed_tests: Backend API health endpoints (100% success rate)
All 13 DRHP sections created automatically with correct metadata
Document upload, download, and deletion operations
OCR processing with AI integration (Gemini 2.5 Flash)
DRHP Builder page displays all 13 sub-modules with descriptions
Section cards show icons, titles, descriptions, document counts, download options
Cover Page structured form fields (company_name, logo_url, addresses, contacts, lead_managers, registrar)
Risk Factors structured form fields (internal_risks, external_risks, business_risks, regulatory_risks, legal_risks, financial_risks)
Capital Structure structured form fields (authorized_capital, paid_up_capital, pre_ipo_shareholding, post_ipo_shareholding)
Introduction and Summary section with select dropdown for issue types
Objects of the Issue section with financial fields
Management & Promoter Group section with management fields
Tab navigation between Structured Form and Notes & OCR
Document upload functionality with file input and drag-drop zone
OCR scan button triggers AI processing successfully
Save button saves form data and persists correctly
Status dropdown with Draft/Review/Final options works
Download Latest button downloads most recent document
Individual document download buttons work
Document deletion functionality works
Form field validation and data persistence across page reloads
Session authentication with provided test credentials
Navigation between different section editors
